name: Iso11783IL_FSSeekFile
title: Iso11783IL_FSSeekFile
syntax: long Iso11783IL_FSSeekFile( dword fileHandle, dword mode, dword offset );
description: This function moves the current write/read position of an open file or the read position of directory entries within a directory.

parameters.name: fileHandle
parameters.description: File or directory handle, see also Iso11783IL_FSOpenFile
